dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal uses 6-day and 100-day historic volatility comparison as a regime filter. Mapped to hvol_6 < hvol_100 for entry and hvol_6 >= hvol_100 for exit (reversal). Direction is context-dependent per original signal. No stop loss or hold period specified by author.

backtest_rule.reason: Signal uses 6-day and 100-day historic volatility comparison as a regime filter. Mapped to hvol_6 < hvol_100 for entry and hvol_6 >= hvol_100 for exit (reversal). Direction is context-dependent per original signal. No stop loss or hold period specified by author.

source_rule_text: Enter trades only when 6-day historic volatility is less than 100-day historic volatility, which filters trades to reduce entries by approximately 50%.
